title: Reusable Page Summary Header — full-span stat strip + Work Items adopter
scope:
Introduce a Vector-standard Page Summary Header primitive — a full-span horizontal stat strip rendered above a page's main content. The strip shows label+value cells (e.g. TOTAL ITEMS, EPICS, TASKS, DEFECTS) and an optional trailing search slot, modelled on the screenshot reference supplied by the operator.

The component composes <Panel name="page_summary"> so it inherits the addressable substrate (PLA-0005), the TbHelpHexagon trigger top-right, and the Page Help fetch path (PLA-0008). All visual rules live in app/globals.css as a single .page-summary catalog block — no inline styles, no per-component CSS-in-JS, per the project HARD CSS RULE.

The first adopter is the /work-items page: the strip renders above the Filters panel with five cells driven by the work-items tree state (Total, Epics, Tasks, Defects, Blocked) and the search input is hoisted out of WorkItemsFilterBar into the new strip's trailing slot.
value:
• Gives users an at-a-glance read of any dataset rendered below — they can see the shape (counts by type, defect/blocked totals) before scanning rows.
  • Establishes a single reusable primitive for every page in the product, reducing drift in summary-strip implementations.
  • Inherits the Page Help substrate automatically, so every adopter gains a discoverable, gadmin-editable help doc by virtue of being a registered _panel.page_summary addressable.
  • Hardens the no-inline-styles rule by adding a clean catalog block that other adopters extend rather than duplicate.
implementation_plan: Build the <PageSummaryHeader> primitive in app/components/ composing <Panel name="page_summary">; types: cells: SummaryCell[], search?: SearchSlotProps. Tone 'warning' paints amber only when value > 0.
Add the .page-summary catalog block to app/globals.css (grid layout, cell, glyph, search, warning-tone, responsive collapse). Reuse .tile__label and .t-metric tokens for typography.
Adopt on /work-items above the Filters panel; compute 5 cells from items state (Total, Epics, Tasks, Defects, Blocked). Hoist the existing search input into the strip's trailing slot.
Seed a Page Help row keyed to addressable kind=panel name=page_summary so the help icon resolves a real doc.
Land Vitest contract tests covering empty cells, populated cells, warning-tone class application, and search-slot onChange so future refactors regress visibly in CI.
areas_impacted: UI: new <PageSummaryHeader> primitive in app/components/, new .page-summary CSS catalog block in app/globals.css
ITM: Work Items page (/work-items) becomes the first adopter; filter-bar layout adjusted to remove the search input
AUD: page_help seed for the new panel.page_summary addressable, sourced from the existing library_help_defaults seed mechanism
feature_list: <PageSummaryHeader> primitive: cells prop (label, value, optional tone, optional glyph) + optional search slot
Composition over <Panel> so the strip auto-registers as samantha._<viewport>._panel.page_summary
Help icon (TbHelpHexagon) top-right with click popover backed by Page Help
.page-summary CSS catalog block (grid, cell, glyph, search, --issue tone, responsive collapse)
Warning tone paints --warning only when the cell's value > 0 (resting state stays neutral)
First adopter: /work-items strip with 5 tree-state cells (Total, Epics, Tasks, Defects, Blocked) + hoisted search
Seed Page Help doc for panel.page_summary so the help icon serves real content from day one
Vitest contract tests covering empty/populated/warning/search behaviours
features_removed: Search input no longer rendered inside <WorkItemsFilterBar> (moved into the new <PageSummaryHeader> trailing slot)

work_item_backlog.title: Build <PageSummaryHeader> primitive composing <Panel> with metric cells + search slot
Adopt PageSummaryHeader on Work Items page above filters with tree-state cells
Seed Page Help row for panel.page_summary so the help icon serves content
Vitest snapshot + render tests for PageSummaryHeader

acceptance_criteria.criterion: app/components/PageSummaryHeader.tsx exports a default React component with TypeScript prop types {cells: SummaryCell[], search?: SearchSlotProps, name?: string}
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: File exists at the path; tsc --noEmit passes; props typecheck against fixtures used by the Vitest suite

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Rendered output contains a <section class="panel"> with data-address attribute matching samantha._<viewport>._panel.page_summary
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: DOM inspection in test harness or Storybook shows the data-address attribute populated correctly

acceptance_criteria.criterion: For input cells with a warning tone and value>0, the DOM shows .page-summary__cell--issue on that cell
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Vitest assertion against rendered DOM with cells fixture {label:'DEFECTS',value:6,tone:'warning'}

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Passing search={value, onChange, placeholder} renders an <input type="search"> with class .page-summary__search and the provided value
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Vitest assertion against rendered DOM with a non-empty search prop

acceptance_criteria.criterion: grep -nE '\.page-summary( |\.|__|--|\{)' app/globals.css returns at least 6 declarations including all named subclasses
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Shell grep emits 6+ matches covering .page-summary, __cell, __cell--issue, __glyph, __search, plus an @media collapse rule
Shell grep returns zero matches; eslint custom rule on inline styles also passes for the file

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Computed style of .page-summary__cell--issue .t-metric resolves to var(--warning)
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Browser computed-style readback OR Vitest jsdom + getComputedStyle assertion confirms the colour token

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Visiting /work-items shows a full-span .page-summary strip rendered above the Filters panel
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Manual browser check on /work-items + DOM contains .page-summary as the first child of PageShell content

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Cell values reflect items state — totals match items.length and per-type counts match item_type filters
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: With a 28-item fixture (4 epics, 12 tasks, 6 defects, 6 stories) the rendered cells show 28/4/12/6 with DEFECTS carrying .page-summary__cell--issue

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Typing in the .page-summary__search input updates filters.search via patchFilter and re-filters the items list
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Manual or e2e check: typing reduces visible rows AND reduces matching cell totals to the filtered subset

acceptance_criteria.criterion: A library_help_defaults row exists for addressable_kind='panel' AND addressable_name='page_summary'
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: psql SELECT against the seeded row returns one record with title='Page summary' and body_html length > 50

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /api/page-help/<id> for the page_summary panel returns 200 with a non-empty body_html and matching title
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: curl response status 200 + JSON body containing title:'Page summary' and body_html length > 50

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Clicking the help icon on the work-items summary strip opens a popover whose body contains the seeded help copy
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Manual /work-items click test: popover shows 'Cells are derived from…' substring rendered by HelpDocRenderer

acceptance_criteria.criterion: app/components/__tests__/PageSummaryHeader.test.tsx contains 3 it() blocks covering empty/populated/search behaviours
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: File exists with 3 it() blocks; npm run test -- PageSummaryHeader exits 0

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The populated + warning tone test asserts that tone:'warning' value:0 does NOT carry --issue while tone:'warning' value:6 does
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Vitest output shows both assertions green when run; commenting either out flips the suite to red

risks.risk: Hoisting the search input out of WorkItemsFilterBar could regress an existing e2e/keyboard-flow test that targets the old DOM location
risks.mitigation: Run the work-items e2e suite after the adopter lands; update any selectors that target the old search input path; the hoist is a single-file change so reverting is trivial

risks.risk: Tree-state cell counts could drift from server-side totals if the local items state is filtered before the cells receive it
risks.mitigation: Compute cells from the same items array WorkItemsTree consumes, after the search filter is applied — the spec explicitly defines cells as reflecting the filtered subset, so this is the desired behaviour

risks.risk: Page Help seed could fail to find the addressable_id at first render if the panel hasn't registered yet on a cold mount
risks.mitigation: Panel.tsx already lazy-fetches /api/page-help/<id> on first popover open AND only after addressable_id resolves; the existing fallback path covers this
